response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience in software development, geospatial projects, and system optimization aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his primary focus has been on TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited exposure to modern C++/Rust in production environments. His geospatial work (GISCollective) is promising but not deeply rooted in routing/navigation pipelines. His willingness to learn and adapt is evident, but direct experience with high-performance routing data pipelines is missing.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing (GISCollective) and distributed systems (Optilyz, re:cinq)
Experience with performance optimization and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby media)
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and expand expertise across the stack
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++/Rust in routing or navigation pipelines
Geospatial work (GISCollective) is open-source and not scaled to global routing systems
Most recent work focuses on AI-agent infrastructure and web/mobile stacks rather than routing data pipelines
